title: Peppery Croatian Banana Sauce
description: A decadent and lazy Sunday dessert featuring a creamy, peppery banana sauce made with sous-vide bananas for an easy and indulgent treat.

ingredients.name: sugar-free syrup (for dipping)
ingredients.notes: 200ml water, 50g sugar, and a pinch of salt, combined and boiled for 5 minutes to make the syrup.

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 78°C (172°F) and vacuum pack whole bananas. Let them cook for 5 hours.
Once cooked, transfer the sous-vived bananas into a heatproof bowl, add sugar-free vanilla extract, unsweetened coconut flakes, and scrape in the seeds of a split vanilla bean pod.
Whisk together caster sugar and butter until smooth, then gradually pour over banana mixture. Continue whisking to combine.
Stir in cocoa powder, making sure it's well incorporated into the sauce.
If you want a smoother texture, strain through a fine-mesh sieve.
To serve, allow your bananas to cool slightly before drizzling with sugar-free syrup.
